falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held 5200-5300; this would confirm the pattern has failed and a lower structural low is forming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX spike to ~28 then collapse; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation not present in the prior bottom pattern, proving this is a different regime (liquidation event vs. bottom formation)

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom coincided with yields ~3.80-4.00%; a flight-to-quality bid driving yields sub-3.50% would signal recession/deleveraging panic rather than the soft-landing reflation setup embedded in the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
